note: No-op migration. trellis 0.13.0 publicly shipped the P14 (remove) and P15 (AST patch) tooling — all tool-side. The only resources/templates change since 0.12.x was b2b-saas/_fragments/page/meta.json, an on-demand fragment applied by `trellis add`, not part of any existing project's tree. Exists to keep the upgrade chain contiguous so `trellis upgrade` can step a project across this minor.
